chapter_title.en: Chapter on Disciplining and Testing a Child

parts.text: 4748 - وَ رَوَى صَالِحُ بْنُ عُقْبَةَ قَالَ

text: سَمِعْتُ اَلْعَبْدَ اَلصَّالِحَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: "تُسْتَحَبُّ عَرَامَةُ اَلْغُلاَمِ فِي صِغَرِهِ لِيَكُونَ حَلِيماً فِي كِبَرِهِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4748 - Salih ibn Uqbah narrated that he heard the Righteous Servant (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) say:
"It is recommended for a boy to be lively and energetic in his childhood so that he may grow to be gentle and patient in his adulthood."
